title: Mega Millions jackpot
transcript:
Mega Millions, and someone could have a very happy holiday.
Tomorrow's drawing... worth an estimated 944 million dollars.
That is the largest December jackpot in the game's history.
The cash value of that, by the way, just over 429 million.
I don't know how the details of the lottery work,
but if you do win tomorrow, do you get the money in time for Christmas, or is it too late?
No, I think you gotta wait till the new year. But they might tax you on it this year.
Oh, that's right.
It's well worth the wait.
